attributes.name: data-hover-animation
attributes.description: Triggered on mouseenter / mouseleave. Values: comma-separated animation names.

attributes.name: data-play-animation
attributes.description: Triggered immediately on page load. Values: comma-separated animation names.

attributes.name: data-toggle-animation
attributes.description: Triggered on click. Values: comma-separated animation names.

attributes.name: data-scroll-animation
attributes.description: Triggered when element is scrolled into view. Values: comma-separated animation names.

attributes.name: data-animation-variables
attributes.description: JSON string for global animation configuration. Schema: {enterClass?, leaveClass?, prefix?, text?, variant?, type?, threshold?, receiver-id?}

attributes.name: data-hover-variables
attributes.description: JSON string for hover-specific configuration. Overrides global variables.

attributes.name: data-play-variables
attributes.description: JSON string for play-specific configuration. Overrides global variables.

attributes.name: data-toggle-variables
attributes.description: JSON string for toggle-specific configuration. Overrides global variables.

attributes.name: data-scroll-variables
attributes.description: JSON string for scroll-specific configuration. Overrides global variables.

attributes.name: data-toggle-receiver-id
attributes.description: Unique ID for identifying elements that should receive toggled classes from a dynamic_toggle trigger.

values.name: character_animation
values.description: Splits text and animates characters individually.

values.name: dynamic_toggle
values.description: Toggles classes based on trigger state.
